title: Skirmish
description: Modpack designed around 3rd person combat, inspired by the Dark Souls games.
body:
Modpack focused around 3rd person combat, inspired by the Dark Souls games.

This modpack is currently in proof of concept/Alpha phase!

This pack currently includes:
  • New Weapons from SimplySwords and More Bows
  • New Armors from Immersive Armors
  • New Shield mechanics
  • Amazing new 3rd person mode
  • Mobs don't burn
  • New Bosses
  • And more :D
❓ FAQ :

🔄 Verisoning :

The modpack uses this version system: Major.Minor.Patch

  • Major : A new version of minecraft or a big modpack change, these updates are not backwards compatible.
  • Minor : New mods might have been added or removed, read the changelogs to see if it's backwards compatible.
  • Patch : Updated mods, safe to update worlds.

🟪 Why Quilt? :

They have a better website.

💻 Minimum system requirements:

With these specs I was able to achive an average of 60 fps.

  • CPU > Dual core 2.4GHz
  • RAM > 2 GB (given to minecraft)
  • GPU > Integrated Graphics with 2 GB of VRAM
🪦 Other stuff included :
Shoulder Surfing Reloaded
Towers of the Wild
Towers of the Wild: Additions
Repurposed Structures Compat Datapacks
Based on the 💉Adrenaline performance pack!
